title: Chaenostoma revolutum
taxonomy: Chaenostoma revolutum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It belongs to the genus Chaenostoma, which is a group of plants native to southern Africa. Chaenostoma revolutum is further classified as a member of the family Scrophulariaceae, which includes plants commonly known as figworts and broomrapes. The species is native to South Africa, where it grows in a variety of habitats. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and phylogenetic relationships.
